TKT-001.summary: This is a password reset request affecting a single user with a time-sensitive deadline. While the user has an urgent meeting, this is a standard account access issue with a straightforward workaround (password reset), not a full system outage or security incident.
TKT-001.resolution_summary: 1. Verify user identity using corporate directory and confirm employment status; 2. Access Active Directory or identity management system (e.g., Okta, Azure AD)
steps_taken: 1. Verify user identity using corporate directory and confirm employment status
2. Access Active Directory or identity management system (e.g., Okta, Azure AD)
3. Locate user account for John Doe (Software Engineer)
5. Generate temporary password meeting complexity requirements
6. Communicate temporary password to user via secure channel (phone or verified email)
7. Instruct user to log in with temporary password
8. User will be prompted to create new password on first login
9. Verify successful login and account access restored
10. Document ticket with completion time and confirmation from user

TKT-002.summary: This is a standard account lockout issue affecting a single user with a clear resolution path available. While the user indicates urgency, account lockouts are routine and typically have quick workarounds (password reset, admin unlock).
TKT-002.resolution_summary: 1. Verify the user's identity through callback verification or employee database lookup; 2. Access the Active Directory or user management system
steps_taken: 1. Verify the user's identity through callback verification or employee database lookup
2. Access the Active Directory or user management system
3. Locate Sam Locked's account and confirm locked status
4. Click 'Unlock Account' in the account properties
5. Reset the user's password to a temporary secure password
6. Communicate the temporary password to the user via secure channel
7. Instruct user to log in with temporary password and change it immediately upon first login
8. Confirm user has regained access to their account
9. Document the unlock action and password reset in the ticket

TKT-003.summary: VPN connectivity is a critical business system for remote work. While only one user is currently impacted, this is a recurring technical issue (not a one-time outage) that's blocking productive work and needs investigation beyond basic troubleshooting.
